articles.title: New York governor pleads with unions to resume talks amid North America's largest commuter rail system shut down - PBS
articles.description: The MTA has said it plans limited shuttle buses to New York City subway stations. Hochul urged companies and agencies that employ workers from Long Island to let them work from home whenever possible.
articles.content: NEW YORK (AP) New York Gov. Kathy Hochul pleaded with unions representing workers for the Long Island Rail Road, North America's largest commuter rail system, to resume bargaining Sunday, saying the … [+5283 chars]

articles.title: France says cruise ship Andes virus matches known South American viruses - WTOP
articles.description: PARIS (AP) — France’s Pasteur Institute said it has fully sequenced the Andes virus detected in a French passenger from the MV Hondius cruise ship and found that it matched viruses already known in…
